headline: Elon Musk Chimes In As Delta Picks Amazon Leo Over Starlink: They Wanted To Make It 'Painful, Difficult And Expensive'
summary: Elon Musk said Delta Air Lines Inc. passed on integrating SpaceX's Starlink internet because the carrier wanted passengers to use a branded login portal, while Starlink insisted on a seamless connection that works without one. Musk Says Delta Wanted A...

headline: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.
